check.action: Halt with: "Worktree {{worktree_path}} has uncommitted changes. local-merge requires a clean state. Commit, stash, or discard the changes first. Output:\n{{git_status_output}}"
Halt with: "Worktree {{worktree_path}} is on branch '{{actual_branch}}', not the expected '{{branch}}'. Inspect with `wt list` and `git branch -a`."
Halt with: "Target branch '{{target_branch}}' does not exist locally. Verify with `git branch -a`. If it exists only on the remote, fetch first: `git fetch origin {{target_branch}}`."

substep.title: Confirm Branch Is Ahead of Target

check.action: Halt with: "Branch '{{branch}}' has no commits ahead of '{{target_branch}}'. Nothing to merge. Inspect the implementation log; this likely indicates an I-phase failure that wasn't surfaced earlier."
